sutta: monks possessed of 7 qualities among is killed in the discipline of what's happened he knows what is an offense he knows what is not he knows what is a trifling offense he knows what is a grave 1 he is virtuous he abides restrained by the restraint of the pati moka perfect in conduct and resort seeing danger in the smallest fort accepting the training he trains himself accordingly at will easily and without trouble he attains to the 4 jaanas of the higher mind bringing comfort both here and now by destroying the asavas he enters and abides in the emancipation by mind and wisdom which is asava free and in this state he knows and realizes for himself even in this life verily monks possessed of these 7 qualities among is killed in the vinaya so these are the qualities which make a monk skill in the vinaya but we notice and the last 2 vectors uh this attainment of the 4 jhanas and the destruction of the asavasa that also makes a monk skill in the discipline why because for a month to attain the 4 jana sir he needs a lot of discipline and his mind has to be very disciplined before he can attain the janus and similarly for the destruction of the asavas has completely disciplined his mind then only can attain destruction of the asava's
